You didn’t stop for the bag

You stopped for the idea

@chromeheartsofficial 
doesn’t design for teams

@chicagobulls 
doesn’t collab with cults

but your brain
paused anyway

Because something about it
felt like it should exist

That’s the trick

The best concepts
aren’t loud

they’re familiar
in a way you can’t explain

Two worlds
you’ve seen a thousand times
stitched into something
you’ve never seen once

that’s gravity

And the only reason
you felt it
is because someone
built it on purpose

A few days ago, we gifted a NOTRED tee and the Memento Mori ring to Oddible. 

No plan behind it. Just felt right in the moment to gift it to a fellow grinder who’s work is steadily building a reputation within the global techno underground circuit.

Then last night at Gylt, somewhere between the red lights and that heavy, rolling bass… We noticed it.

Same tee. 
Same ring. 
Just… living its own life out there.

You don’t really control where what you create ends up. You just keep creating—and hope it finds the right rooms, the right people, the right nights.
This one found its place.
.
#NOTRED #Oddible #GyltBangalor #techno #brand

Rebirth looks different for everyone. 
Which is why every detail of this ring is yours to choose.

If your transformation was forged in fire — choose the Ruby. Carried by royals into battle for centuries, believed to protect the heart and fortify the spirit. Yours to set in Oval, the cut that draws out its deepest, most saturated colour.

If your strength was built quietly, under enormous pressure — choose the Diamond. Each one brilliant. Each one earned.

If you move through the world with permanence — choose 18k Gold. If you carry your edge with restraint — choose Sterling Silver.

Emerald cut for the one who is precise and deliberate. Oval for the one who flows. Cushion for the one who has learned that softness is not weakness.

The Memento Mori is not a ring you pick off a shelf. It is a ring you build — around your story, your stone, your metal, your moment.
.
[ brand, jewellery, custom design, custom jewellery, design, notred, scars, diamonds ]
#brand #jewellery #design #notred #diamond

Diamonds didn’t become luxury overnight. They moved through civilizations, trade routes, empires, and cultures; changing meaning along the way. 

What started as a rare natural material eventually became one of the most recognized symbols of value. Not because of what it is. 

But because of what people BELIEVE it represents.

NOTRED — Archive

Across cultures and civilizations, certain materials take on meanings beyond their physical form.

Gold became one of them.

It moved through temples, palaces, tombs, and eventually into modern luxury.

The context changes.

The symbolism rarely does.

NOTRED

Slightly Hedonistic Life.

A celebration of pleasure, imperfection, and the parts of yourself you were told to hide.

We believe flaws are features. 
Indulgence is honesty. 
And life is meant to be felt.

A new chapter from Not Red.

THE FIRST JEWELLERY
40,000 Years Ago

Before gold and diamonds, humans wore ornaments made from
animal teeth, bones, shells, and ivory.

These pieces were discovered in Ice Age caves in Europe, proving that even early humans used jewellery to express identity and belonging.

Jewellery began as a language of survival.

[Jewelry, Jewellery, Brand, Notred, History]

[Jewelry, Jewellery, Brand, Notred, History]

“Not reckless. Just devoted to feeling everything.” 

My notebook was filled with the raw data of survival—the Lupus, the betrayal, the pain. People ask “Why Red?” but the real question is “Why Not?” Why not feel it all? Why not turn every drop of that intensity into art?
Refining “Love.” From the margins of a notebook to the reality of a touch.

Memento Mori.
Women’s diamond ring.

Remember that you must die, so that you may truly begin to live. This isn’t just a ring; it’s a reminder to savor every moment, every scar, and every triumph.

Finding meaning in the “Ups and Downs”

Pain is often raw and overwhelming. Refining it into pleasure is acknowledging that the “hurt” was real but not the end of the story and treating the visual marks of your journey as a “masterpiece” rather than something to hide.

They ask, “Why Red?”. Here is the unfiltered answer. Every stroke of this brand is fueled by the words in this notebook.

We named the brand Not Red because it’s not just a color you see—it’s a life you survive. It’s about taking every “I can’t do this any longer” and turning it into “Art”. We don’t just wear the red; we own the fire that made it.

The eyes see the pain, but the hands create the masterpiece. 

Don’t just feel the red—use it.

Live visuals by Not Red

Red, black, and white aren’t just colors in their world-  they’re signals, emotions, states of mind.
Their visuals don’t decorate; they distort, pulse, fracture and echo, a visual hallucination, perfectly synced to sound.

Catch them at @theburrow.blr

8pm onwards

Our Symbol 👁️

Not Red’s logo is the quiet assurance that you are protected and powerful, even when the world feels chaotic. 

We believe protection is a luxury, which is why the Eye of Horus sits at the heart of our brand: a silent guardian hidden within our logo and every piece we create.

#notred #red #eyeofhorus #ai #design

Our Symbol 👁️

Not Red’s logo is the quiet assurance that you are protected and powerful, even when the world feels chaotic. 

We believe protection is a luxury, which is why the Eye of Horus sits at the heart of our brand: a silent guardian hidden within our logo and every piece we create.

#notred #red #eyeofhorus #ai #design
That’s how we do it.

WHO WE ARE 🔺

We go by the name NOT RED — a visual identity that disrupts, provokes, and embodies tension. In our world, red, black, and white aren’t just colors — they’re emotions and states of mind.

Every frame becomes a visual hallucination, perfectly synced to sound.

But we don’t just make visuals — we build sensory environments meant to shift perception and stretch experience. Whether live, in motion, or lingering long after, NOT RED isn’t something you just watch.
It’s something you feel. And it leaves an imprint.

#touchdesigner #dj #producer #audiovisual [ touchdesigner, audiovisual, techno, hypnotic, repetition, visual art, live, di, producer, phaserbeats, notred ]

The Scene 003 
This one was special — it was the first time we brought out @notredindia , a joint audio-visual project between me and @siddhii.sawant_ . It’s our little world of sound and visuals coming together the way we feel them.
Still early days, but this was the first step — and it felt right.

Shared the night with @dj_ansn , @magnimus__ , and @devaamsh.rajesh as part of the @magnimusik crew — and @devaamsh.rajesh absolutely delivered with a closing set that shook the walls.

Big love to everyone who came through, danced hard, and stayed with us through the whole ride. You made it worth it.❤️

Photos: @mk_studiox 
.
.
.
.
.

#reels #indiranagarsocial #touchdesigner #techno #notred

Shared the night with @dj_ansn , @magnimus__ , and @devaamsh.rajesh as part of the @magnimusik crew — and @devaamsh.rajesh absolutely delivered with a closing set that shook the walls.

Big love to everyone who came through, danced hard, and stayed with us through the whole ride. You made it worth it.❤️

Photos: @mk_studiox
